signals.content: Decision Intelligence is the missing layer between AI tools and business outcomes
AI-native companies bottleneck on judgment calls, not build capacity
Top founders document why decisions were made, not just what was decided
AI Chief of Staff products conflate execution with strategic decision support
Agent capability exceeds organizational decision infrastructure in most startups
Vocal customers overweight roadmaps — founders need decision frameworks that weight growth stage

signals.pain: Solo founder decision overload with no lightweight system
signals.product_implications: Lightweight decision journal for solo founders with strategic question templates

signals.pain: No decision documentation; AI tools without decision clarity
signals.product_implications: Decision logging with outcome tracking tied to prioritization choices

signals.decision: Prioritized enterprise SSO over SMB onboarding
signals.outcome: Enterprise deal closed but SMB activation dropped 18%
signals.lesson: Overweighted vocal enterprise customers vs growth-stage SMB base
